requirements.content: Provide five more activity ideas.
Provide ten more activity ideas.
Avoid workshops that require a teacher.
Avoid activities requiring extensive materials.
Avoid long trips due to organizational resource limits for a large group.
Provide 10 more activity ideas without repetition.
Provide 10 more activity ideas as a final round.
Do not repeat any previously suggested activities.
Activities should not require a lot of preparation or organization.
Provide a roadmap of actions to organize the event.
List what information to provide a designer to properly scope/assign the landing page task.
Provide reference links via an internet search (companies offering vacations/remote work programs with villa stay and activities).
Create a relaxed 7-day timeline schedule from the activities, including meals and rest.
If too many activities, exclude some and list excluded items separately.
If the plan is not full enough, add placeholders with timeslots.
Monday must be an arrival day with only a relaxed evening planning activity due to staggered arrivals and villa entry at 15:00.
Sunday must be an ending day with no activities planned because the villa is returned in the morning.
Remove duration phrases like "(3 hours)" from the schedule output.
Move participant presentations and the swim pool party to Tuesday after lunch.
Move hiking to around Thursday/Friday and ensure there is a physically draining activity that day.
Delete Beer Pong as a separate activity and replace it with another social activity.
Output the schedule in English.

outputs.content: Activity idea lists for a 7-day villa program (multiple rounds, progressively constrained, non-repeating)
Ten additional activity ideas avoiding teacher-led workshops, extensive materials, and long trips
Ten more activity ideas without repetition (with permission to say if not possible)
Final round: ten more activity ideas with no repeats and minimal preparation/organization (ignoring earlier boundaries)
Roadmap of actions to organize the villa event
Information checklist/brief content to provide a designer to scope an event landing page
Reference companies and links for organized vacations/remote work villa programs (as examples, with verification caveat)
Relaxed 7-day timeline schedule (meals + rest) built from the activity list and refined via user edits
Initial relaxed 7-day schedule draft in the user-provided format (with allowed exclusions/placeholders and day constraints)
Revised final 7-day schedule in English reflecting requested moves/replacements and formatting constraints
